# AI Mastery Academy — Full Reference

## About

AI Mastery Academy is a practical, live AI training school based in Lagos, Nigeria, serving learners across Africa and globally online. We teach non-engineers how to use AI tools to grow businesses, get jobs, create content, work smarter and earn online. All training is delivered as live cohorts on Zoom with recordings, templates and community access. Operated by LiveGig Ltd. Designed by Frank Bazuaye.

Website: https://grow-with-ai-academy.lovable.app
WhatsApp: +234 705 426 5401

---

## Program 1 — AI for Business Growth Masterclass

- **Audience:** Business owners, founders, marketers, operators
- **Format:** 2 Saturdays · Live on Zoom · 2 hours per session
- **Dates:** Saturday 4 July 2026 and Saturday 11 July 2026
- **Time:** 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM WAT (UTC+1)
- **Outcome:** Use AI to get customers, write sales messages, build a content engine and close deals on WhatsApp.
- **Tools covered:** ChatGPT, Canva, Grammarly, AI image tools, voice tools, WhatsApp
- **Registration:** /register/ai-business-growth
- **Curriculum:** /programs/ai-business-growth/curriculum

### Day 1 — Foundation + Content Engine
1. AI Basics (no jargon) — what AI is, types of tools, how SMBs use it
2. Mastering ChatGPT — Role + Task + Context + Output prompt framework
3. Everyday AI Tools — Canva, Grammarly, image and voice tools
4. Content Creation Part 1 — IG posts, WhatsApp promos, Facebook ad copy

### Day 2 — Sales, Marketing & Automation
1. Sales & Marketing — converting messages, WhatsApp scripts, hooks
2. Making Money with AI — better messaging, faster content, new income streams
3. Simple AI Workflows — Content workflow + Sales workflow templates
4. Final Practical — flyer, 3 social posts, sales message, WhatsApp script, 7-day content plan

### Bonuses
- Prompt Templates Pack
- 30-Day Content Calendar
- Sales Scripts Library
- Flyer Templates

---

## Program 2 — AI Video Bootcamp for Teens: Create, Post & Grow

- **Audience:** Teens aged 13–19
- **Format:** 4 Saturdays · Live on Zoom · 2–3 hours per session
- **Dates:** Saturdays 1, 8, 15 and 22 August 2026
- **Time:** 11:00 AM – 1:30 PM WAT (UTC+1)
- **Outcome:** Create scroll-stopping AI videos, understand trends and algorithms, and unlock real ways to monetize as a teen creator.
- **Tools covered:** ChatGPT, CapCut, YTRadar
- **Registration:** /register/ai-video-teens (parent/guardian details required)
- **Curriculum:** /programs/ai-video-teens/curriculum

### Saturday 1 — AI Video Foundations (1 Aug 2026)
- How short-form video really works in 2026
- Full AI video workflow: idea → script → visuals → edit → post
- Toolkit intro: ChatGPT, CapCut, YTRadar
- Activity: pick niche and channel name

### Saturday 2 — Trending Topics & Hook Engineering (8 Aug 2026)
- Spotting trends with YTRadar
- 3-second hook formula
- Scripts with ChatGPT (without sounding like a robot)
- Activity: 5 hooks + 1 full script

### Saturday 3 — CapCut Deep Dive (15 Aug 2026)
- CapCut interface (mobile + desktop)
- Auto captions, transitions, effects, sound
- CapCut AI: voiceovers, scripts, templates
- Thumbnail design
- Activity: edit first finished video

### Saturday 4 — Post, Grow & Monetize (22 Aug 2026)
- Best times & platforms (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)
- Hashtags, captions, algorithm
- Monetization: creator funds, brand deals, services
- Final project: publish first AI video live

### Bonuses
- Hook & Script Templates Pack
- CapCut Preset Library
- 30-Day Posting Calendar
- Teen Creator Community Access

---

## Other tracks (cohorts opening soon)

- **AI for Job Seekers** — CVs, interviews, AI-assisted job hunting
- **AI for Content Creators** — research, scripting, editing workflows
- **AI for Professionals** — productivity, research, document workflows
- **AI for Freelancers** — service offers, proposals, client delivery

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is AI Mastery Academy for?**
Beginners — entrepreneurs, job seekers, creators, professionals, freelancers and teens. No coding or technical background required.

**Are classes live or recorded?**
Live on Zoom, with recordings shared after each session so you can rewatch.

**Where is the academy based?**
Lagos, Nigeria. We serve learners across Africa and globally — all classes are online.

**Do I get a certificate?**
Yes, a digital certificate of completion is issued after each program.

**How do I register?**
Use the registration page for an active program, or send an enquiry from /enquire. You can also message us directly on WhatsApp at +234 705 426 5401.

**What does the AI for Business Growth Masterclass cost?**
Pricing is shown at registration. Payment is handled securely via Paystack.

**Is the AI Video Bootcamp safe for teens?**
Yes — it requires a parent/guardian's name during registration and uses only mainstream, age-appropriate tools (CapCut, ChatGPT, YTRadar).

**What if I miss a session?**
You'll receive the recording and can catch up before the next live session.

---
